steps.title: Identify the goal
steps.content: The student wants to (1) quote Fazal and (2) explain an advantage of the binary cycle system at Platanares. The relevant Fazal quote about binary cycle systems says they pump 100% geothermal fluid back to the injection well, hence offering the least environmental impact.

steps.title: Match the choice
steps.content:
Choice C connects the binary cycle's fluid-return process to the least environmental impact, attributes the quote to Fazal, and identifies Platanares as a binary cycle plant — hitting all three goals.

A misuses the per-megawatt quote (which compares geothermal to solar/wind, not within geothermal types). B misattributes little or no emissions to a different reason. D quotes Fazal but doesn't state an advantage.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
